project_context.archetype: Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play) crossed with Latin Cultural Vibrancy
project_context.vibe: Modern, energetic, friendly, culturally resonant, mobile-first

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-slate-900
typography.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-slate-900

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy with Bento Grid modes

buttons.primary: bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-700 text-white font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(234,88,12,0.3)] transition-all hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] hover:bg-[#16A34A] text-white font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(37,211,102,0.3)] flex items-center gap-2 transition-all hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border-2 border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-900 font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all

cards.advertiser: bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl shadow-slate-200/50 overflow-hidden border border-slate-100
cards.admin_widget: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-slate-200 p-6

audio_player.layout: Fixed bottom, z-50, w-full sm:w-[calc(100%-2rem)] sm:bottom-4 sm:left-4 sm:right-4 bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-t-3xl sm:rounded-3xl shadow-2xl
audio_player.controls: Min 44x44px touch targets. Play button in primary orange.
audio_player.now_playing: Scrolling marquee for long track names, fast-marquee library recommended.

hero_banner.style: Full bleed image, heavy text on the left, warm tones.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons must lift (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow opacity.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in with slight upward translation (framer-motion).

hero_radio_studio.description: Main hero background showing radio hosts in a dynamic studio environment

listener_joy.description: Happy listeners wearing headphones, used for community/engagement sections

advertiser_food.description: Placeholder image for a local food/restaurant advertiser (Sopes with cheese)

advertiser_retail.description: Placeholder image for a local cafe or secondary advertiser (Quesadilla)

instructions_to_main_agent: MUST USE HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout and Advertiser Pages. Do NOT use standard Shadcn Cards for creative marketing sections.
MUST USE Shadcn UI exclusively for the Admin Dashboard (Tables, Dialogs, Select, Forms).
Ensure 'Now Playing' player is sticky at the bottom with high z-index (z-50) and thumb-friendly controls (min 44px).
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #808080. Use Slate-900 and Slate-500 instead.
Include a prominent bilingual toggle (ES/EN) in the main navigation.
Implement 'data-testid' attributes on ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
For the Advertiser Active state, the homepage should visually transition to feature the active advertiser's brand prominently in the hero section.
Integrate WhatsApp links using generic format 'https://wa.me/number?text=encoded_message'.
